{{Infobox technique
| name = Foxfire
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Foxfire Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Foxfire is a specialized manifestation of [[White Fox]] [[madra]], characterized by its appearance as spinning balls or sparks of purple-edged white flames. Although it is an illusion that generates no actual heat, it functions as a spiritual attack capable of inflicting intense physical agony upon contact with flesh. Because it is an illusion, the flames cannot be extinguished, and they can be used to illuminate targets or cloud an enemy's vision with phantom lights. While considered the weakest technique within the [[Path of the White Fox]], foxfire is a potent tool for Strikers to manipulate. It can also be used effectively against [[Remnants]], burning them more efficiently than living beings.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Foxfire]] is an illusion of flame that produces no actual heat but causes the agony of real fire upon touching flesh.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Foxfire]] is purple and white.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei and [[Kazan]] [[Jade]] elders summoned foxfire.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade experts]] used foxfire in combat.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Kelsa]] wove her [[madra]] into [[Foxfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can conjure purple flickering [[Foxfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Foxfire]] is a technique used in combat.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Kelsa]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a fox’s tail of purple-white foxfire.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Kelsa]]'s tail is associated with [[Foxfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kelsa]] uses [[Foxfire]] in the form of tiny purple-white fireballs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
